title: Streams, Redirection, Quoting, and Pipelines
description: Build a repeatable incident-report pipeline whose data and diagnostics remain distinct and whose failures cannot be hidden by downstream success. Learners cumulatively produce a stream-routing and pipeline-trace workbook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace standard input, standard output, standard error, file descriptors, and terminal attachment across a command.
Predict truncating, appending, input, descriptor duplication, and combined redirection from left-to-right order.
Apply unquoted, single-quoted, double-quoted, escaped, and ANSI-C quoted contexts to preserve intended arguments.
